question: Cookies are packed in bags of 6. If there are 85 cookies, what is the maximum number of bags that can be filled completely?
Tom has 3 times as many marbles as Jerry. Together they have 80 marbles. How many marbles does Tom have?
Pencils are sold in boxes of 8. What is the minimum number of boxes needed to get at least 50 pencils?
Amy has 5 times as many stickers as Ben. After Amy gave 50 stickers to Ben, they had the same number. How many stickers did Amy have at first?
Find the next number in the pattern: 3, 6, 12, 24, 48, ...
There are 45 students. Each van can carry 7 students. What is the minimum number of vans needed?
John has 4 times as many books as Mary. After John bought 18 more books and Mary bought 3 more books, John had 5 times as many books as Mary. How many books did Mary have at first?
Apples are packed in trays of 10. If there are 127 apples, how many apples will be left over after filling as many trays as possible?
Find the missing number in the pattern: 5, 10, 17, 26, __, 50
Lisa has 3 times as much money as Kate. After Lisa spent $40 and Kate spent $10, they had the same amount. How much money did Lisa have at first?
Balloons are tied in bunches of 9. What is the maximum number of complete bunches that can be made from 100 balloons?
There are 2 times as many boys as girls in a class. After 12 boys and 5 girls joined, there were 3 times as many boys as girls. How many girls were there at first?
Find the next number: 1, 4, 9, 16, 25, ...
Notebooks cost $4 each. What is the maximum number of notebooks that can be bought with $35?
Peter has 6 times as many cards as Paul. After Peter gave 75 cards to Paul, they had the same number. How many cards did Peter have at first?
Find the missing number: 2, 5, 11, 23, 47, __
Eggs are packed in cartons of 12. A farmer has 155 eggs. How many cartons can be filled completely?
Sam has 4 times as many toy cars as Tim. After Sam bought 20 more cars and Tim bought 5 more cars, Sam had 3 times as many cars as Tim. How many cars did Tim have at first?
Find the next number in the pattern: 100, 95, 85, 70, 50, ...
Ribbon is sold in rolls of 5 metres. What is the minimum number of rolls needed to get at least 38 metres of ribbon?
